name: Aloha Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice dried figs.
2. Cut the pineapple in half, scoop out the center, and cut into bite-size chunks.
3. Drain the oranges.
4. Arrange the figs, pineapple chunks, and oranges in the pineapple shells.
5. Whip the cream; stir in sugar and coconut (reserve some coconut for topping if desired).
6. Spoon the whipped mixture over the fruits.
7. Garnish with fresh mint if desired.
